CustomField.formula: IF(!ISBLANK(Image_URL__c), HYPERLINK(Image_URL__c, IF(ISPICKVAL( Image_Dimensions__c, "Rectangle (Tall)" ),IMAGE(Image_URL__c, "",198,132), IF(ISPICKVAL( Image_Dimensions__c, "Rectangle (Wide)"),IMAGE(Image_URL__c, "",132,198), IF(ISPICKVAL( Image_Dimensions__c, "Square" ), IMAGE(Image_URL__c, "",200,200), "")))),"")
CustomField.label: Image
